pricing.faq1_a: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your admin interface. Changes are effective immediately.
pricing.faq2_a: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and SEPA transfers for annual plans.
pricing.faq3_a: Yes, security is our priority. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We are hosted on ISO 27001 and SecNumCloud certified infrastructure.

fair.title: Risk Quantification
fair.subtitle: FAIR Analysis and Monte Carlo Simulation

list.emptyDesc: Create your first financial risk analysis to quantify the impact of your cyber risks.

create.title: New FAIR Analysis
create.description: Configure basic parameters to quantify financial risk.

delete.title: Delete this analysis?
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. All simulation results will also be deleted.

toast.createdDesc: The FAIR analysis has been created successfully.
toast.duplicatedDesc: A copy of the analysis has been created.

form.name: Analysis Name
form.scenarioTypeHelp: Select the type of cyber risk to quantify. Default values will be pre-filled.
form.frequencyHelp: Number of times this event could occur per year. E.g., 0.5 = once every 2 years.
form.lossHelp: Estimated financial impact in case of incident (direct and indirect costs)
form.controlHelp: Overall assessment of your security measures effectiveness

fair.noResultsDesc: Run a Monte Carlo simulation to quantify this risk.

roi.title: ROSI Calculator
roi.subtitle: Return on Security Investment
roi.aleHelp: Current annual loss expectancy from FAIR analysis
roi.formulaNote: Risk reduction is estimated based on control improvements. Each 10% improvement reduces ALE by approximately 15%.

comex.title: Executive Dashboard
comex.subtitle: Executive view of financial cyber risks
comex.varNote: VaR represents the maximum expected loss at the indicated confidence level
comex.summaryText: Total cyber risk exposure is estimated at {{ale}} per year (ALE), with a maximum loss risk of {{var95}} at 95% confidence. {{count}} risk scenarios have been quantified using the FAIR model. Average control strength is {{control}}%.
comex.topRiskNote: The main risk "{{name}}" represents {{percent}}% of total ALE.

voxel.title: 3D Visualization
voxel.subtitle: Explore your GRC ecosystem in 3D
voxel.description: Interactive 3D visualization of your governance, risk and compliance data
voxel.webglUnsupportedDesc: Your browser doesn't support WebGL, which is required for 3D visualization.

fallback.mobileDescription: 3D visualization is optimized for desktop computers. Use the alternative view to access your data on mobile.
fallback.mobileHint: For the full 3D experience, access Sentinel GRC from a desktop computer.
fallback.noWebGLDescription: Your browser doesn't support WebGL, the technology required to display 3D visualization.
fallback.degradedDescription: Your browser only supports WebGL 1.0. Some visual features may be limited.
fallback.errorDescription: An error occurred while loading the 3D visualization. Please use the alternative view.

roleManagement.noPermission: You do not have the necessary permissions to manage roles.
roleManagement.noUsersFound: No users found in your organization.
roleManagement.noteDescription: Role changes take effect immediately. Users may need to log out and back in to see the changes.

backup.deleteBackupConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete backup {{id}}?

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect your tools to automate evidence collection.

apiKeyModal.title: Connect {{provider}}
apiKeyModal.description: Please enter your API key (or Token) to allow Sentinel GRC to access {{provider}} data.
apiKeyModal.label: API Key / Token
apiKeyModal.hint: This key will be stored securely and used only for synchronization.

confirm.disconnectMessage: Do you really want to disconnect {{provider}}?

errors.noPermission: You don't have permission to connect services.
errors.invalidApiKey: Please enter a valid API key.

UNKNOWN_ERROR.hint: Try refreshing the page. If the problem persists, contact support.

NETWORK_ERROR.hint: Check your internet connection and try again.

PERMISSION_DENIED.hint: You don't have the required permissions. Contact your administrator for access.

MISSING_INDEX.hint: The database is being configured. Please try again in a moment.

AUTH_FAILED.hint: Check your credentials. Forgot your password?

AUTH_EXPIRED.hint: For your security, please log in again.

AUTH_INVALID_PASSWORD.hint: Password must contain at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, and one number.

INVITE_FAILED.hint: Check that the email is correct and the user is not already a member.

FETCH_FAILED.hint: Data could not be retrieved. Check your connection.

CREATE_FAILED.hint: Make sure all required fields are filled in correctly.

UPDATE_FAILED.hint: Changes could not be saved. The item may have been modified by someone else.

DELETE_FAILED.hint: This item may be linked to other data. Check its dependencies.

EMAIL_SEND_FAILED.hint: Check the email address and try again.

VALIDATION_FAILED.hint: Check the highlighted fields and correct the indicated errors.

REQUIRED_FIELD.hint: This field must be filled to continue.

INVALID_FORMAT.hint: Check the expected format for this field.

FILE_UPLOAD_FAILED.hint: Check the file size (max 10 MB) and allowed format.

FILE_TOO_LARGE.hint: Maximum size is 10 MB. Compress your file or use a lighter format.

FILE_INVALID_TYPE.hint: Accepted formats: PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, PNG, JPG.

QUOTA_EXCEEDED.hint: You have reached your plan's limit.

RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.hint: Please wait a few seconds before trying again.

ASSET_NOT_FOUND.hint: This asset may have been deleted or you don't have access.

RISK_NOT_FOUND.hint: This risk may have been deleted or archived.

PROJECT_NOT_FOUND.hint: This project may have been deleted or you don't have access.

DOCUMENT_NOT_FOUND.hint: This document may have been deleted or moved.

AUDIT_NOT_FOUND.hint: This audit may have been deleted or archived.

SCAN_FAILED.hint: The security scan could not be performed. Check the asset configuration.

REPORT_GENERATION_FAILED.hint: The report could not be generated. Make sure all required data is available.

AI_ERROR.hint: The analysis service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

HIBP_FAILED.hint: The data breach verification service is unavailable.

DELETE_ACCOUNT_FAILED.hint: Your account cannot be deleted at this time. Contact support.

LINK_GEN_FAILED.hint: The share link could not be created. Please try again.

PORTAL_ACCESS_FAILED.hint: Check that the link is valid and not expired.
